FAILURE TO MAINTAIN BLDG:DEFECTS:IN APT.1&3 ROTTEN CEILING BEAMS APT.3 ROTTEN FL.JOINST 3 IN BATHROOM AREAS 1ST & 4 FLS.REAR APTS.-APT.1 ST FL.REAR NUMEROUS HOLES IN WALLS & CEILING DEFECTIVE FL.IN BATHROOM

WORK W/O A PERMIT. 1 FLR APT WALLS AND FLOORS OPENED. NEW COPPER WATERLINES, NEW PVC DRAIN AND VENT LINES AND NEW GAS LINE FROM CELLAR TO 1 FLR. REMEDY: OBTAIN PERMIT OR RESTORE PREMISES TO PRIOR LEGAL CONDITIO
